name: Inside Line
actionText: Ignore all Grip penalties this turn. +2 Momentum.

name: Manual
actionText: Swap Row 1 & Row 2 tokens. Draw 1 card (draw 2 if different lanes).

name: Flick
actionText: Shift Rows 1-2 tokens 1 lane toward center. +1 Momentum.

name: Recover
actionText: Remove 2 Hazard Dice (or repair 1 Penalty). Draw 1 card.
